name: envchain
description: Set environment variables with macOS keychain or D-Bus secret service

name: -s
--set
subcommands.description: Add keychain item of environment variable +ENV+ for namespace +NAMESPACE+

name: -P
--no-require-passphrase
options.description: Do not ask for keychain passphrase

name: -l
--list
subcommands.description: List namespaces that have been created
